name: qwen2_5_0_5b_instruct_pinned_artifact
purpose: Machine-readable pin of the external model artifact identity used by M2 fixtures (tokenizer, chat template, safetensors metadata). Mirrors the Pinned Revision section of docs/model-target.md so tests can assert against an exact SHA without parsing prose.

artifact.license_source: Hugging Face repo metadata at pinned revision

tokenizer.notes: Same revision as the artifact pin. Token-ID and chat-template fixtures derived from this revision must reference the SHA above.

scope.weight_files_note: Per docs/validation/fixtures.md storage policy, large model weights (safetensors) must not be committed. M2.5 will commit only tiny synthetic safetensors fixtures plus, optionally, captured metadata (tensor names/shapes/dtypes/byte ranges) extracted from the pinned revision.

applicability_notes: This fixture is a manifest, not a behavioral fixture. The prompt/expected_output/tolerance fields required by docs/validation/fixtures.md for behavioral fixtures are explicitly null here. Behavioral fixtures (e.g. fixtures/tokenizer/qwen2_5_basic_prompt.json) reference this manifest's artifact.revision for their source-of-truth.
license_considerations: Apache-2.0 permits redistribution and modification with attribution. No model weights are redistributed by this manifest; only the upstream identity is recorded. Derived fixtures that capture tokenizer JSON content or safetensors metadata must preserve upstream license attribution and remain small enough to fall under fair-use/quotation norms regardless.
